title: Completion claims must fail closed when required evidence is incomplete
observed: The prior reconciler could emit effective_status completed while required_evidence_complete was false.
The corrected reconciler preserves the aggregate status, marks the completion claim unresolved, and records the unsupported completed claim as superseded.
inferred: Fail-closed status projection prevents additive records from upgrading shared state beyond their evidence.
proposed: Use the reconciler output as a derived read model; do not mutate canonical or append-only source records automatically.
superseded: A latest temporal update may determine effective completion even when required evidence is incomplete.
unresolved: Repository CI has not yet executed the corrected committed test file.
privacy_boundary: Uses only public repository paths, blob SHAs, abstract queue states, and deterministic test outcomes. Excludes private chat, health, relationship, financial, credential, and uploaded-file content.
falsification_or_review_route: Run node tools/continuity/queue-reconciler.test.mjs from a checkout at or after commit 6b753927a2d4a35de4bb62c24e5cf37ce8a4d0d9. Reject this resolution if an incomplete evidence set can still produce effective_status completed.
